top.contains: A bright blue header containing the white 'prime' logo with its smile arrow, and two large magenta spec-label boxes. One spec label is at the top center, and a second spec label runs vertically down the far left edge of the blue area.

left.contains: A solid blue vertical frame border. Just below the blue header (within the frame, not the art zone), there is a tall, magenta vertical spec-label running down the frame edge.

right.contains: A solid blue vertical frame border.

frameAnalysis.corners: The entire top edge is occupied by a complex blue header with multiple logos and large red spec-label text blocks. A thin blue frame runs along the bottom and both side edges, but is very thin on the right. A tall vertical red spec-label is positioned on the left blue frame, just below the header section.
frameAnalysis.instructions: This is a tall vertical template. The top approximate 25% is completely obscured by branding and spec text, and the far left side also has spec text, so any critical information or main subjects must be kept within the bottom 75% of the frame and shifted away from the left edge. Focus the hero subject in the bottom two-thirds. Any primary text or title must be clearly legible and positioned within the central 50% width and bottom 50% depth of the composition to avoid getting obscured.
